configuration.survivorship_bias_note: Uses the current 125-stock institutional-core universe across historical dates; historical constituent changes are not reconstructed.
configuration.lookahead_control: Each signal uses only the trailing window ending on T0; execution and outcomes start from the next trading day.
configuration.dual_path_policy_note: Confirmed Breakout OR Tradeable Second Leg; thresholds unchanged and Second-Leg score penalties removed from the shared setup score.

evaluation_readiness.warning: Do not change gates from groups below 30 completed samples. Compare net return, MFE and MAE, not win rate alone.

policy_feasibility.interpretation: Confirmed Breakout and Tradeable Second Leg are independent OR paths. A path may generate Direct Buy samples without the other path passing.

breakout_path_safety.label: 第一段突破無明確 Second-Leg Trap
第一段突破無明確 Second-Leg Trap
